hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in */apps/api/src/*.ts) cd /Users/user/Desktop/Projects/ToDoMaster/apps/api || exit 0; pnpm exec jest --findRelatedTests "$f" --passWithNoTests ;; */apps/web/src/*.ts|*/apps/web/src/*.tsx) cd /Users/user/Desktop/Projects/ToDoMaster/apps/web || exit 0; pnpm exec vitest related "$f" --run ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac

f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); [ -z "$f" ] && exit 0; case "$f" in */apps/api/src/*) : ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac; [ -f "$f" ] || exit 0; if grep -qE '@Api(Property|Tags|Operation|Response|Bearer)' "$f"; then printf '{"systemMessage":"%s introduces a Swagger decorator (@ApiProperty/@ApiTags/etc.) \u2014 nestjs-documentation-conventions confirms this repo has no Swagger tooling configured. If this is an intentional new convention say so explicitly; otherwise remove it."}' "$f"; fi; exit 0

hooks.statusMessage: Checking for blocked git operations (pairs with /refactor)
hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -z "$cmd" ] && exit 0; seg=$(echo "$cmd" | tr ';|&' '\n' | grep -E '^[[:space:]]*(command[[:space:]]+)?git[[:space:]]+push([[:space:]]|$)'); [ -z "$seg" ] && exit 0; if echo "$seg" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]])(--force|--force-with-lease|-f)([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Force-push is blocked during refactoring work. If genuinely needed, run it outside of /refactor."}}'; exit 0; fi; blocked=""; while IFS= read -r line; do rest=$(echo "$line" | sed -E 's/^[[:space:]]*(command[[:space:]]+)?git[[:space:]]+push//'); pos=$(echo "$rest" | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -vE '^-' | grep -vE '^[[:space:]]*$'); if [ -z "$pos" ]; then upstream=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name '@{u}' 2>/dev/null); branch=$(echo "$upstream" | sed -E 's#^[^/]+/##'); echo "$branch" | grep -qE '^(main|master)$' && blocked=1; else while IFS= read -r arg; do dest=$(echo "$arg" | sed -E 's/^.*://'); echo "$dest" | grep -qE '^(main|master)$' && blocked=1; done <<< "$pos"; fi; done <<< "$seg"; if [ -n "$blocked" ]; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Direct push to main/master is blocked (including bare git push when upstream tracks main/master, and refspecs targeting it). Push a branch and open a PR instead."}}'; fi; exit 0

hooks.statusMessage: Scanning staged changes for secrets (pairs with /review)
hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); [ -z "$cmd" ] && exit 0; echo "$cmd" | tr ';|&' '\n' | grep -qE '^[[:space:]]*(command[[:space:]]+)?git[[:space:]]+commit([[:space:]]|$)' || exit 0; if ! command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"gitleaks is not installed, so the pre-commit secret scan cannot run. Install it first (brew install gitleaks), then retry the commit."}}'; exit 0; fi; cd /Users/user/Desktop/Projects/ToDoMaster || exit 0; if ! gitleaks protect --staged --no-banner --redact >/tmp/gitleaks-output.txt 2>&1; then reason=$(tr '\n' ' ' </tmp/gitleaks-output.txt | sed 's/"/\\"/g'); printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"gitleaks found a likely secret in the staged changes: %s"}}' "$reason"; fi; exit 0
